Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GEORGIA VANYA'S Motion For Order Substituting Personal Representative For Deceased Plaintiff.

Plaintiff Georgia Vanya's motion is granted. Mr. Herb Thomas has filed a declaration under penalty of perjury which meets the requirements of Code of Civil Procedure section 377.32(a) and has attached a certified copy of the decedent's death certificate pursuant to section 377.32(c). Mr. Thomas may therefore continue the pending action as decedent's successor in interest.

Order is signed
